title: Garlicky Crisp Saudi Arabian Oxtail Stew
description: A rich and indulgent Saudi Arabian stew featuring tender oxtail, crispy garlic, and a blend of aromatic spices, all made without dairy products. This hearty dish is perfect for a special occasion or a cold winter's night.
instructions: In a large Dutch oven, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the sliced garlic and cook, stirring occasionally, until crispy and golden brown, about 5-7 minutes. Remove the garlic from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and lightly browned, about 8-10 minutes.
Add the oxtail pieces to the pot and cook, stirring occasionally, until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the tomato paste, ground cumin, ground coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper to the pot. Cook, stirring constantly, for 1-2 minutes.
Add the vegetable broth to the pot and bring to a boil. Cover the pot with a lid and transfer to the preheated oven.
Braise the stew, covered, for 2 1/2 to 3 hours, or until the oxtail is tender and falling off the bone.
Remove the pot from the oven and stir in the crispy garlic. Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
